info.title: Lupira Tasks API
info.description: Task and command processing backend for Lupira. Authenticate with a Bearer token issued by the OIDC provider (Authentik).

get.description:
Returns the current list plus all its live items (v1 full re-derive,
regardless of `?since=`) and a `nextCursor` to pass on the next pull. The
client rebases its local mirror onto this base, then re-applies non-acked
outbox rows.

get.summary: Provision and return the caller's profile.
get.description:
Upserts the caller's `UserProfile` from the bearer token (create on first
login, else bump `LastSeenAt` and refresh display name / admin flag) and
returns `{ email, displayName, isAdmin }`. Call on app cold start.

get.summary: People seen across the caller's shared lists (for adding members).
get.description: `?q=` filters the distinct member emails (case-insensitive substring).

get.summary: List the lists the caller is a member of.
get.description: `?archived=true` returns the caller's archived lists instead of the active ones.

post.summary: Create a list; the caller becomes Owner.
post.description: Body `{ id (GUIDv7), name, kind, color? }`. Re-sending an existing id is an idempotent success.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

get.summary: Get a list with its members and tags (Viewer+).

patch.summary: Rename / recolor a list, or set its priority mode (Editor+).
patch.description: Each provided field emits its own event. Set `colorProvided` to apply `color` (incl. clearing it). Send `simplePriority` (bool) to switch between simple on/off and the full 0..9 scale.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

delete.summary: Delete a list (Owner). Tombstone — stream retained.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

post.summary: Archive a list (Owner). Soft — items retained.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

post.summary: Add a member by email (any member; defaults to Editor).
post.description: Body `{ email, role? }`. Direct-add, no invite/accept. A wrong email is inert.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

delete.summary: Remove a member, or leave (self). Last owner leaving deletes the list for everyone.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

get.description: Excludes deleted items; ordered by `sortOrder`. Filters: `completed`, `tagId`, `parentItemId`, `assignedTo`.

post.description: Body `{ id (GUIDv7), title, parentItemId?, dueAt?, assigneeEmail?, quantity?, unit?, priority? (0..9), tagIds?, sortOrder, occurredAt? }`. Re-sending an existing id is idempotent.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

patch.description: One event per changed field. Use the `*Provided` flags so a null can mean 'clear' rather than 'unchanged' (e.g. `priority` 0..9 with `priorityProvided`). Tags via `addTagIds`/`removeTagIds`.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

delete.description: Optional `?occurredAt=` (ISO-8601) carries the client timestamp for LWW.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

post.description: Carries the fractional-index `sortOrder` string and optional `parentItemId`.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

post.summary: Mint a public share link for a list (Owner).
post.description: Body `{ access: 'Read' | 'ReadWrite', label?, expiresAt? }`. Returns the opaque token + a ready-to-copy URL. The link grants account-less access at `/shared/{token}` until revoked or expired.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

get.summary: List a list's active share links (Owner).

delete.summary: Revoke a share link (Owner). The token is rejected on its next use.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

get.summary: View a shared list by token (no account needed).
get.description: Returns the list + items, trimmed of all emails. `access` indicates read vs read/write.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Opaque share-link token (validated by the ShareToken auth scheme).

post.summary: Add an item via a read/write share link.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Opaque share-link token (validated by the ShareToken auth scheme).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated GUIDv7 command id. A redelivery with the same key is a no-op that returns the prior result (offline-safe retry).

Bearer.description: OIDC bearer token. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
